history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A vibrant and whimsical digital illustration advertising freelance job opportunities, likely for a project called "Bubble Project." The overall aesthetic is cute, playful, and uses a soft pastel color palette dominated by pink, purple, yellow, and mint green, with hand-drawn elements and doodle-like embellishments.

At the top, large, bubbly, pastel-colored letters spell out "LOKER KERJA FREELANCE" with "BUBBLE PROJECT" in a smaller, curved banner below. Decorative elements like lightning bolts, stars, and a pink megaphone with sound waves emanate from the title area. A bright rainbow arcs across the upper right, with two smiling clouds flanking it. A speech bubble on the right says "Gabung Sekarang!" with a heart inside.

Below the title, a prominent section highlights the low joining fee: "join cuma 15K ajaa!!" in large, bold pink numbers, with small stars and hearts as accents.

To the left, a section titled "COCOK UNTUK KAMU YANG:" (Suitable for you who:) lists target demographics with star and heart bullet points: "Pelajar / Mahasiswa" (Student/University Student), "Ibu Rumah Tangga" (Housewife), "Kaum Rebahan" (Those who like to relax/chill), "Ingin penghasilan tambahan" (Want additional income), and "Dan lain-lain" (And others).

To the right of that, under the heading "JENIS PEKERJAAN" (Job Types), four categories are listed with corresponding icons and numbers:
1.  A briefcase icon, labeled "Agen bisnis" (Business Agent).
2.  A SIM card icon, labeled "Agen kouta" (Quota Agent).
3.  A shopping cart icon, labeled "Agen Dropsiper" (Dropshipper Agent).
4.  A handbag icon, labeled "Agen olshop" (Online Shop Agent).

Below the "COCOK UNTUK KAMU YANG:" section, there's another section titled "KEUNTUNGAN JOIN" (Benefits of Joining) with pink heart bullet points detailing advantages: "Full bimbingan dari nol!" (Full guidance from scratch!), "Tidak perlu pengalaman" (No experience needed), "Bisa dikerjakan dari rumah" (Can be done from home), "Waktu fleksibel" (Flexible time), "Penghasilan tidak terbatas" (Unlimited income), "Support & mentoring aktif" (Active support & mentoring), and "Terbukti membayar" (Proven to pay).

In the bottom left, "PEMBAYARAN VIA." (Payment Via.) shows logos for DANA, OVO, ShopeePay, and GoPay.

The bottom center has a section "Full bimbingan dari nol!" (Full guidance from scratch!) with the text "Kita ajarin sampai bisa, jadi langsung cuan deh~" (We'll teach you until you can, so you'll make profit right away~). Below this, another section "COCOK UNTUK KAMU YANG:" (Suitable for you who:) lists personal attributes: "Mau punya penghasilan sendiri" (Want to have your own income), "Mau belajar hal baru" (Want to learn new things), "Serius & mau berkembang" (Serious & want to grow), and "Siap diajak cuan bareng!" (Ready to make profit together!).

The bottom right features a "HUBUNGI KAMI YUK!" (Let's Contact Us!) section with a WhatsApp icon and the contact number "085373231737", followed by a Telegram icon and the username "@peopleasha". A cute illustration of a letter with a heart on it is placed to the right of this contact information.

The very bottom of the poster has a call to action in a playful font: "Yuk mulai sekarang, ubah waktu luang jadi peluang cuan!" (Let's start now, turn your free time into profit opportunities!).

The background is a light, grid-lined paper texture, resembling a notebook page, with scattered pastel doodles, stars, hearts, and scribbled lines that add to the handmade, cheerful feel. The lighting is bright and even, consistent with a digital illustration. The overall mood is encouraging, friendly, and aspirational.
